description:
Add a toggleable lat/lon graticule layer to the Mars globe and a corresponding label panel in the UI.

- Renderer: add a named 'grid' layer that draws latitude/longitude lines over the globe using Cesium primitives (e.g. GridImageryProvider or manually-drawn polylines at configurable intervals — 30° is a reasonable default)
- Label panel: a small Google Maps-style card (consistent with existing UI aesthetic) that displays the cursor's current lat/lon as it moves over the globe
- Grid toggle: exposed in the Layers panel alongside existing toggleable layers
- Labels should use standard Mars areocentric coordinates (0–360° E longitude, -90–90° latitude)
title: Add lat/lon grid lines and coordinate label panel
